hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | { read -r cmd; echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^git commit' || exit 0; echo '=== Pre-commit check ===' >&2; docker-compose exec -T rails bundle exec rspec >&2 || { echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"RSpec failed. Fix test failures before committing."}}'; exit 0; }; docker-compose exec -T rails bundle exec rubocop >&2 || { echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Rubocop failed. Fix lint violations before committing."}}'; exit 0; }; docker-compose exec -T next npm run lint >&2 || { echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Next.js lint failed. Fix lint errors before committing."}}'; exit 0; }; echo '=== All checks passed ===' >&2; }
